description:
About the job
Join youX — where finance meets technology.
We’re youX, a fast-growing fintech company transforming the asset finance landscape through powerful, intuitive technology. Our platforms are used by brokers, lenders, and dealerships across Australia — and we’re growing fast. Right now, we’re looking for a Full Stack Developer to help us level up even further.

About Us
At youX, we build technology that simplifies finance. Our solutions range from B2C digital pre-approval tools to CRM and SaaS platforms used by some of the country’s most forward-thinking broker groups and dealerships.
You’ll join a collaborative, cross-functional team of developers, brokers, marketers, and product specialists based in our Sydney office — all working together to build great products and deliver game-changing customer experiences.

What You’ll Be Doing
Work across a range of frontend and backend projects — from user-facing tools to behind-the-scenes systems.
Contribute to development sprints, collaborating with designers, product owners, and other devs to bring features to life.
Troubleshoot bugs and implement robust, maintainable fixes.
Assist in the design of scalable systems and services.
Take part in code reviews, testing, and documentation to support quality and growth.
Stay up to date with industry trends and share your knowledge with the wider team.

What We’re Looking For
Minimum 5 years of full stack development experience.
Solid skills in JavaScript/TypeScript and React. Bonus if you’ve worked with Next.js.
Experience working with databases like MongoDB.
Familiarity with Node.js, microservice environments, Docker and/or Kubernetes is a big plus.
Comfortable integrating with third-party APIs.
Strong communicator — able to work well in a team and clearly explain technical decisions.
Bonus points if you have experience in fintech or leading and mentoring junior developers.

Why Join Us?
Work on real products used by thousands of customers.
Be part of a growing fintech team that’s reshaping the asset finance space.
Idea-driven culture — everyone has a voice.
Supportive team, exciting roadmap, and plenty of growth opportunities.

If you're ready to build real-world products, sharpen your skills, and grow with a supportive team, apply now and let’s talk!
